response.step_by_step_log: 1. Identified the video as a compilation of four distinct segments. 2. 00:03-00:15: JOYSOUND promotion identified as a jingle. Lyrics transcribed based on on-screen text. 3. 00:19-00:33: Hololive merch promo identified as instrumental background music, no vocal song. 4. 00:36-00:51: Yoshinoya TVCM identified, lyrics transcribed based on audio. 5. 00:53-05:03: Long promotional segment for Hololive CD collection, determined to be instrumental background music with vocal-free segments for fan messages.
response.global_summary: This video is a compilation consisting of an opening logo, a JOYSOUND anime karaoke promotion, a Hololive 3rd generation merchandise advertisement, a Yoshinoya 125th anniversary television commercial, and a long promotional segment for a Hololive 3rd generation mini-CD collection featuring fan messages.

scenes.description: JOYSOUND 'どアニメ宣言!' anime karaoke promotion featuring a vocal jingle sung by an animated character.
scenes.song_title: どアニメ宣言! (JOYSOUND Promo Jingle)
scenes.reference_lyrics_og: アニメにハマって 歌いたくなっちゃった! 推しのシーン見ながら カラオケ歌えるなんて... 尊すぎてツライっ! 歌いたい曲見つけよう!
scenes.reference_lyrics_en: Addicted to anime, I started to want to sing! Watching my favorite scenes and getting to sing karaoke... It's too precious, it's painful! Let's find the songs we want to sing!

scenes.description: Promotion for Hololive 3rd generation merchandise with background instrumental music.
Yoshinoya 125th Anniversary television commercial featuring the vocal jingle '吉野家でごはんでしょ'.
scenes.song_title: 吉野家でごはんでしょ (Yoshinoya TVCM Jingle)
scenes.reference_lyrics_og: 吉野家でごはんでしょ♪ ぎゅう。 ぎゅうぎゅう。 うま。 元祖の本気、召し上がれ。 牛丼は吉野家。 今日も、吉野家日和です。 やっぱこれな。
scenes.reference_lyrics_en: Let's have a meal at Yoshinoya. Beef. Beef, beef. It's delicious. The original earnest, please enjoy. Yoshinoya for beef bowl. It's Yoshinoya weather today too. I guess it has to be this.

scenes.description: Promotional segment for Hololive 3rd generation mini-CD collection with scrolling fan messages and instrumental background music.
